mismatch.description: The 'action' field is required by producer_signal_schema.json v1.0.0 (lines 145, 194-196). It MUST be one of: EXECUTE, WITHHOLD, INVERT. Consumers MUST respect this field for routing decisions.
mismatch.remediation_applied: Add 'action' to every emitted signal. Derive it from policy gates: INVERT if weak_symbol inverted, WITHHOLD if regime-suppressed or VOI-filtered, EXECUTE otherwise.

patch.description: Added 'action' field derivation to sovereign signal output. Logic: INVERT if weak_symbol inverted, WITHHOLD if VOI-suppressed or regime-filtered, EXECUTE otherwise.

derivation_logic.INVERT: weak_symbol_inverted == true (symbol accuracy < 50%, policy is INVERT)
derivation_logic.WITHHOLD: regime_filter active (SYSTEMIC → SUPPRESS_DIRECTION) OR voi_filter active (expected karma < threshold)
derivation_logic.EXECUTE: no suppression gates triggered, signal is actionable

per_signal_summary.detail: action=MISSING; N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing or invalid type)
action=MISSING; N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing or invalid type)
action=MISSING; N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing or invalid type)
action=MISSING; N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing); N/A (field missing or invalid type)

conformance_command: python3 check_conformance.py --endpoint http://localhost:8080/signals/latest --schema producer_signal_schema.json --mismatch action_field_missing --before-snapshot snapshots/before.json -o conformance_receipt.json --summary

limitations.description: Before snapshot is stored, not captured live in same session
Conformance checks single mismatch, not full schema validation
Point-in-time check; future code changes could regress
Policy consistency check infers expected action from gate flags, not from source logic
INVERT conditional check (weak_symbol metadata) not fully testable under SYSTEMIC regime
After snapshot fetched at check time; signals may differ from moment of patch verification
